top_findings.title: Search match data from CSV files
top_findings.evidence: src/data.rs:DataStore implements CSV loading; src/tools.rs:search_matches implements search. Tests fail at tests/integration_test.rs:11 due to hardcoded /tmp path.
top_findings.suggestion: Fix test data path to use relative paths or environment variables

top_findings.title: Search player data
top_findings.evidence: src/tools.rs implements search_players method; Player struct defined in src/data.rs. Test fails due to data path issue.

top_findings.title: Calculate basic statistics
top_findings.evidence: src/tools.rs:get_team_stats calculates wins/losses/draws. Test fails due to missing data.
top_findings.suggestion: Ensure data files are accessible during tests

top_findings.title: Compare teams head-to-head
top_findings.evidence: src/tools.rs:head_to_head implements comparison logic. Test fails due to data path.
top_findings.suggestion: Fix data path in test setup

top_findings.title: Test data path hardcoded to temporary directory
top_findings.evidence: tests/integration_test.rs:7 uses hardcoded /tmp path that no longer exists; 6 of 9 tests fail with 'No such file or directory'
top_findings.suggestion: Use relative path to data/ directory or environment variable for test data location
